feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets:
# Practical Systems — Episode
## Security as Design, Not a Checklist
Host: Ethan
Guest: Camila
Ethan: Welcome back to Practical Systems.
Today we’re talking about security as design, not a checklist, and I’m joined by Camila.
